Initializer# init(excludingProcesses:deviceUID:stream:)

iOS 17.0+iPadOS 17.0+macOS 14.0+tvOS 17.0+watchOS 10.0+

```
convenience init(
    excludingProcesses processesIDsToExcludeFromTap: [AudioObjectID],
    deviceUID: String,
    stream: UInt
)
```
